2606.11180.title: Lip Forcing: Few-Step Autoregressive Diffusion for Real-time Lip Synchronization
2606.11180.abstract: Diffusion-based lip synchronization models achieve strong visual quality and audio-visual alignment, but full-sequence bidirectional attention and many denoising steps make them impractical for real-time inference. We present Lip Forcing, to our knowledge the first autoregressive diffusion method for video-to-video (V2V) lip synchronization, which distills a 14B audio-conditioned bidirectional video diffusion teacher into causal students. At inference, the students generate each chunk in only two denoising steps without inference-time CFG, enabling real-time lip synchronization. A lip-sync-specific teacher-trajectory analysis reveals a CFG fidelity-sync tradeoff: no-CFG predictions favor reference fidelity, whereas CFG-guided predictions favor synchronization within a mid-trajectory band. Lip Forcing translates this finding into three analysis-derived components: Sync-Window DMD, a two-step inference schedule, and a SyncNet-based reward. We validate Lip Forcing at two student scales, both distilled from the 14B teacher. The 1.3B student crosses into real-time streaming at 31 FPS, $17.6\times$ faster than its same-scale bidirectional model. The 14B student, the largest diffusion model reported for V2V lip synchronization, runs $39.8\times$ faster than its teacher at comparable reference fidelity. Time-to-first-frame is sub-millisecond at both scales, far below every diffusion baseline.
2606.11180.abstract_zh: 基于扩散的唇同步模型虽然能实现出色的视觉质量和音视频对齐效果，但其全序列双向注意力机制与多步去噪过程使得实时推理难以实现。本文提出Lip Forcing方法——据我们所知，这是首个用于视频到视频（V2V）唇同步的自回归扩散模型。该方法将140亿参数的音频条件双向视频扩散教师模型蒸馏为因果学生模型。在推理阶段，学生模型仅需两步去噪即可生成每个视频片段，且无需推理时的分类器自由引导（CFG），从而实现了实时唇同步。通过针对唇同步任务的教师轨迹分析，我们揭示了CFG在保真度与同步性之间的权衡规律：无CFG的预测倾向于保持参考视频的保真度，而CFG引导的预测则在中段轨迹区间内更注重同步性。Lip Forcing将这一发现转化为三个基于分析的核心组件：同步窗口动态模态分解（Sync-Window DMD）、两步推理调度机制以及基于SyncNet的奖励函数。我们在两种规模的学生模型上验证了Lip Forcing的有效性，二者均从140亿参数的教师模型蒸馏而来。其中13亿参数的学生模型实现了31帧/秒的实时流式处理速度，比同规模双向模型快17.6倍；而140亿参数的学生模型——目前报道中规模最大的V2V唇同步扩散模型——在保持相当参考保真度的同时，推理速度比教师模型提升39.8倍。两种规模模型的首帧生成时间均低于毫秒级，远超所有扩散基线模型。

2606.11129.title: WorldOlympiad: Can Your World Model Survive a Triathlon?
2606.11129.abstract: We introduce WorldOlympiad, a benchmark for diagnosing video-based world models across physical faithfulness, geometric consistency, and interaction fidelity. While existing benchmarks often focus on visual quality, semantic alignment, or short-term temporal coherence, they provide limited insight into whether generated videos obey physical rules, preserve coherent 3D structure, and sustain controllable interactions over long horizons. To address this gap, WorldOlympiad decomposes world-model evaluation into three complementary dimensions. The physical track uses object segmentation and MLLM-as-judge to assess whether generated videos follow interpretable rules in mechanics, thermal phenomena, and material properties. The geometry track reconstructs generated videos with Gaussian splatting and evaluates structural consistency, cross-view coherence, and camera-trajectory alignment. The interaction track assesses whether generated rollouts follow complex action prompts and maintain smooth, coherent transitions across consecutive video chunks. WorldOlympiad further covers three major downstream scenarios, including gaming, robotics, and general real-world videos, capturing diverse challenges from interactive control and embodied manipulation to open-domain motion and camera dynamics. Together, these tracks and scenarios form a scalable and interpretable evaluation suite that exposes failure modes beyond generic video quality. Experiments on state-of-the-art models reveal substantial gaps in physical reasoning, 3D consistency, and long-horizon interaction, underscoring the need for more structured evaluation protocols for generative world models.
2606.11129.abstract_zh: 我们推出WorldOlympiad基准测试，旨在从物理真实性、几何一致性与交互保真度三个维度评估基于视频的世界模型。现有基准测试多聚焦于视觉质量、语义对齐或短期时序连贯性，但难以有效判断生成视频是否遵循物理规律、保持连贯的三维结构以及能否维持长时程的可控交互。为填补这一空白，WorldOlympiad将世界模型评估分解为三个互补维度：物理赛道采用物体分割与大语言模型（MLLM）作为评判工具，评估生成视频是否遵循力学、热现象及材料特性等可解释规则；几何赛道通过高斯泼溅（Gaussian splatting）技术重建生成视频，评估其结构一致性、跨视角连贯性及相机轨迹对齐度；交互赛道则检验生成序列能否遵循复杂动作指令，并在连续视频块间保持平滑连贯的过渡。WorldOlympiad进一步涵盖游戏、机器人学与通用真实世界视频三大下游场景，囊括从交互控制、具身操作到开放域运动与相机动态的多样化挑战。这些赛道与场景共同构成可扩展、可解释的评估体系，能够揭示超越通用视频质量的深层缺陷。对前沿模型的实验表明，现有模型在物理推理、三维一致性及长时程交互方面仍存在显著差距，凸显了针对生成式世界模型建立更结构化评估框架的必要性。

2606.10671.title: FadeMem: Distance-Aware Memory Consolidation for Autoregressive Video Diffusion
2606.10671.abstract: Autoregressive video generators synthesize long videos by generating successive temporal segments, but their historical KV cache grows with video length. Existing bounded-cache methods reduce this cost with local windows, sink tokens, or compressed memory states, yet they usually assign fixed roles to different parts of the history. We propose FadeMem, a distance-aware KV memory consolidation mechanism that organizes historical KV blocks into a temporal hierarchy under a fixed cache budget. This design is motivated by frequency-dependent temporal decay: fine details decorrelate quickly, while coarse scene structure and identity remain useful over longer horizons. During generation, new history is inserted as fine-grained entries, while older adjacent entries are progressively merged under a power-law temporal allocation schedule, yielding a dense-near, sparse-far memory within one cache. Without architectural changes, FadeMem preserves recent context for short-term dynamics and compact long-range anchors for identity and scene coherence. Experiments show improved subject consistency, background stability, and temporal coherence over existing bounded-cache strategies.
2606.10671.abstract_zh: 自回归视频生成器通过生成连续的时间片段来合成长视频，但其历史键值缓存（KV cache）会随视频长度增长。现有有限缓存方法通过局部窗口、汇集令牌（sink tokens）或压缩记忆状态来降低开销，但这些方法通常为历史信息的不同部分分配固定角色。我们提出FadeMem——一种距离感知的键值记忆整合机制，它在固定缓存预算下将历史键值块组织为时间层级结构。这一设计受到频率依赖性时间衰减现象的启发：细节信息快速去相关，而粗略的场景结构与身份特征在更长的时间跨度内保持有用性。在生成过程中，新历史以细粒度条目形式插入，而较早的相邻条目则按照幂律时间分配策略逐步合并，从而在单一缓存内形成"近处密集、远处稀疏"的记忆布局。无需改变模型架构，FadeMem既能为短期动态保留近期上下文，又能为身份特征与场景连贯性提供紧凑的远程锚点。实验表明，相较于现有有限缓存策略，该方法在主体一致性、背景稳定性和时间连贯性方面均有提升。

2606.09056.title: MilliVid: Hierarchical Latents for Long-Range Consistency in Video Generation
2606.09056.abstract: Video generative models have become increasingly powerful, but long-range consistency remains challenging to achieve because even a few dozen frames require impractically long transformer sequence lengths. We show that this issue can be mitigated by generating video using coarse-to-fine rollout within a multi-scale token space. Our approach is simple: first, we pre-train an autoencoder that compresses each frame into a hierarchy of tokens, with levels ranging from the typical latent resolution to only a handful of tokens per frame. The coarsest levels capture the most consequential information, such as scene layout and semantics, while finer levels add high-frequency appearance and texture. Then, we train a video diffusion model to generate these tokens using coarse-to-fine rollout. By carefully controlling the level of detail at which frames are generated and used as context during each rollout step, we are able to preserve long-range consistency in geometry and object permanence while spending less compute on the long-range consistency of less perceptually relevant details. We validate this approach using a custom dataset of long Minecraft videos, where it produces substantially more consistent rollouts compared to existing baselines.
2606.09056.abstract_zh: 视频生成模型的能力日益强大，但长程一致性仍是难以实现的目标，因为即使是几十帧的视频也需要不切实际的长序列长度进行变换器建模。我们证明，通过在多尺度标记空间内采用由粗到细的展开生成策略，可以有效缓解这一问题。我们的方法简洁直接：首先预训练一个自动编码器，将每帧图像压缩为多层级的标记体系，其层级范围从典型潜在分辨率直至每帧仅含少量标记。最粗粒度层级捕捉最具决定性的信息（如场景布局与语义结构），而更精细的层级则补充高频外观与纹理特征。随后，我们训练视频扩散模型以由粗到细的展开方式生成这些标记。通过精确控制每步展开过程中生成帧的细节层级及其作为上下文信息的粒度，我们能够在保持几何结构与物体持久性长程一致性的同时，为感知相关性较低的细节分配更少的计算资源。我们使用自建的长序列《我的世界》视频数据集验证了该方法，相比现有基线模型，本方法生成的视频序列在长程一致性上展现出显著优势。

2606.10804.title: SCAIL-2: Unifying Controlled Character Animation with End-to-end In-Context Conditioning
2606.10804.abstract: Controlled character animation requires transferring motion from a driving sequence to a reference character. Prior works heavily rely on intermediate representations, including pose skeletons to represent motion or masked background to represent environment, which inevitably leads to information loss. To address this, we present SCAIL-2, an framework that bypasses those intermediates and achieves \textbf{end-to-end} character animation. By directly concatenating driving videos to the sequence, the model can obtain all the required visual information from the input video. To address lack of end-to-end data, we unify sub-tasks of character animation with decoupled conditions and then curate a pipeline to synthesize MotionPair-60K, an end-to-end motion transfer dataset containing heterogeneous tasks of character animation. To archive the unification, we utilize in-context mask conditioning and mode-specific RoPE as soft guidance beyond textual instructions and raw visual information. To address synthetic discrepancy in detailed regions, we propose Bias-Aware DPO to construct preference items to mitigate the errors. Extensive experiments demonstrate that our method substantially outperforms existing state-of-the-art approaches in various character animation tasks. A large subset of synthetic data as well as model weights will be released at our project page:this https URL.
2606.10804.abstract_zh: 受控角色动画需要将动作从驱动序列迁移至参考角色。先前的研究严重依赖中间表示，包括用于表示动作的姿态骨架或用于表示环境的掩蔽背景，这不可避免地导致信息损失。为解决这一问题，我们提出了SCAIL-2框架，该框架绕过了这些中间表示，实现了**端到端**的角色动画生成。通过直接将驱动视频与参考序列拼接，模型能够从输入视频中获取全部所需的视觉信息。针对端到端数据缺乏的问题，我们通过解耦条件将角色动画的多个子任务统一，并设计了一套流程来合成MotionPair-60K——一个包含异构角色动画任务的端到端动作迁移数据集。为实现任务统一，我们采用了上下文掩码条件与模式特定的RoPE作为软引导机制，以补充文本指令和原始视觉信息的不足。针对合成数据中细节区域的差异，我们提出基于偏置感知的DPO方法构建偏好项以减少误差。大量实验表明，我们的方法在各种角色动画任务中均显著优于现有最先进方法。合成数据的大规模子集及模型权重将在项目页面发布：此HTTPS链接。

2606.09967.title: ABot-Earth 0.5: Generative 3D Earth Model
2606.09967.abstract: We present ABot-Earth 0.5, a generative 3D framework designed to synthesize vast, seamless 3D environments from ubiquitous, geospatially referenced satellite imagery. To achieve this, we propose a novel generative model formulated directly with the 3D Gaussian Splatting (3DGS) representation. The model is trained on a diverse corpus of existing real-world urban reconstructions, learning to generate realistic geometry and textures. At inference, it synthesizes novel 3D scenes conditioned solely on satellite imagery at a scalable rate of under 10 minutes per square kilometer, while demonstrating exceptional realism. The framework is designed for accessibility, with integrated hierarchical level-of-detail (LOD) structures that permit real-time, interactive visualization on web-based map engines. This high-fidelity simulation sandbox effectively mitigates the sim-to-real domain gap, enabling critical downstream Embodied AI applications like closed-loop UAV navigation. By providing an ultra-low-cost and high-efficiency solution, ABot-Earth 0.5 significantly lowers the technical and financial barriers to large-scale 3D reconstruction and empowers the future of global digital earth visualization.
2606.09967.abstract_zh: 我们推出ABot-Earth 0.5，这是一个生成式三维框架，旨在从无处不在、具有地理空间参照的卫星影像中合成广阔且无缝的三维环境。为实现这一目标，我们提出了一种基于三维高斯溅射（3D Gaussian Splatting, 3DGS）表示直接构建的新型生成模型。该模型在多样化的真实世界城市重建数据集上进行训练，从而学习生成逼真的几何结构与纹理。在推理阶段，该模型仅依据卫星影像即可合成全新的三维场景，合成速率可扩展至每平方公里低于10分钟，同时展现出卓越的真实感。该框架注重易用性，集成了分层细节层次（Level-of-Detail, LOD）结构，支持在基于网页的地图引擎上实现实时交互式可视化。这一高保真仿真沙盒有效缩小了仿真与真实领域间的差距，为诸如闭环无人机导航等关键的具体人工智能（Embodied AI）应用提供了支持。通过提供超低成本、高效率的解决方案，ABot-Earth 0.5大幅降低了大规模三维重建的技术与资金门槛，并为未来全球数字地球可视化的发展赋能。

2606.11188.title: ARM: An AutoRegressive Large Multimodal Model with Unified Discrete Representations
2606.11188.abstract: This paper introduces ARM, a discrete representation-based AutoRegressive Model that unifies image understanding, generation, and editing within a next-token prediction framework. ARM is built on three efforts: first, we train a discrete semantic visual tokenizer that maps images into compact token sequences. Our tokenizer is supervised with multiple objectives that jointly promote semantic discriminability, language alignment and faithful reconstruction, thereby supporting diverse tasks in a shared latent space. With this, we train a 7B autoregressive model over large-scale text and image token sequences, seamlessly developing vision-language perception and generation capabilities. Finally, to further improve preference-aligned behavior for text-to-image generation and instruction-guided editing, ARM applies reinforcement learning (RL) to optimize task-level objectives such as visual quality, instruction adherence, and edit consistency. Surprisingly, the results show that RL not only substantially improves performance on the target tasks (e.g., raising WISE overall from 0.50 to 0.56, GEdit-Bench-EN G_O from 5.75 to 6.68), but also induces cross-task synergy between text-to-image generation and editing. Collectively, these findings highlight autoregressive modeling, when paired with strong representations and preference optimization, as a scalable foundation for multimodal intelligence. Code:this https URL.
2606.11188.abstract_zh: 本文介绍了ARM，一种基于离散表示的自回归模型，它将图像理解、生成与编辑统一于下一代预测框架中。ARM建立在三项核心工作之上：首先，我们训练了一个离散语义视觉标记器，将图像映射为紧凑的标记序列。该标记器通过多目标监督训练，共同提升语义区分性、语言对齐性和忠实重建能力，从而在共享的潜在空间中支持多样化的任务。基于此，我们在大规模文本与图像标记序列上训练了一个70亿参数的自回归模型，无缝地发展了视觉-语言感知与生成能力。最后，为进一步优化文本到图像生成与指令引导编辑中的偏好对齐行为，ARM应用强化学习来优化任务级目标，例如视觉质量、指令遵循度和编辑一致性。值得注意的是，结果显示强化学习不仅显著提升了目标任务的性能（例如将WISE总分从0.50提升至0.56，GEdit-Bench-EN G_O从5.75提升至6.68），还带来了文本到图像生成与编辑之间的跨任务协同效应。这些发现共同表明，当与强表征和偏好优化相结合时，自回归建模可作为多模态智能可扩展的基础。代码：此 https URL。

2606.10651.title: Kwai Keye-VL-2.0 Technical Report
2606.10651.abstract: We introduce Kwai Keye-VL-2.0-30B-A3B, an open-source Mixture-of-Experts (MoE) multimodal foundation model designed to advance long-video understanding and agentic intelligence. To address the challenges of ultra-long contexts, information redundancy, and prohibitive computational costs inherent in hour-level videos, Keye-VL-2.0 is the first to adapt DeepSeek Sparse Attention (DSA) to GQA-based multimodal architectures, enabling lossless 256K context processing while capturing critical frames and long-range temporal dependencies. This architecture is underpinned by a highly optimized training and inference infrastructure, including scalable video I/O, heterogeneous ViT-LM parallelism, and custom DSA kernels that significantly maximize throughput and minimize computational overhead. Furthermore, to overcome the algorithmic dilemma of catastrophic forgetting during multi-task alignment, we introduce Cross-Modal Multi-Teacher On-Policy Distillation (MOPD) paired with Context-RL and Video-RL. By distilling dense token-level teacher feedback from on-policy rollouts back into the MoE backbone, which activates only 3B parameters, Keye-VL-2.0 natively empowers advanced agent collaboration across Code, Tool, and Search scenarios with multimodal self-correction. Extensive evaluations across video understanding, temporal grounding, reasoning, STEM, and agent benchmarks demonstrate that Keye-VL-2.0-30B-A3B achieves state-of-the-art performance among models of similar scale, particularly excelling in fine-grained temporal localization on TimeLens and long-video comprehension on Video-MME-v2 and LongVideoBench. We release our model checkpoints to accelerate community progress toward scalable and robust multimodal agentic applications.
2606.10651.abstract_zh: 我们推出Kwai Keye-VL-2.0-30B-A3B，这是一个开源的混合专家模型（Mixture-of-Experts，MoE）多模态基础模型，旨在推动长视频理解与智能体（agentic）智能的发展。针对小时级别视频中固有的超长上下文、信息冗余和过高计算成本等挑战，Keye-VL-2.0首次将DeepSeek稀疏注意力（DeepSeek Sparse Attention，DSA）适配到基于GQA的多模态架构中，实现了无损的256K上下文处理能力，同时能够捕捉关键帧和长程时序依赖关系。该架构依托高度优化的训练与推理基础设施，包括可扩展的视频输入输出系统、异构ViT-LM并行策略以及定制DSA计算内核，显著提升了吞吐量并最大限度地降低了计算开销。此外，为克服多任务对齐过程中灾难性遗忘（catastrophic forgetting）的算法困境，我们引入了跨模态多教师策略蒸馏（Multi-Teacher On-Policy Distillation，MOPD）方法，并结合上下文强化学习（Context-RL）与视频强化学习（Video-RL）。通过将策略探索中获得的密集令牌级教师反馈蒸馏回仅激活3B参数的MoE骨干网络，Keye-VL-2.0原生支持跨代码、工具和搜索场景的高级智能体协作，并具备多模态自我修正能力。在视频理解、时序定位、推理、STEM及智能体基准测试上的广泛评估表明，Keye-VL-2.0-30B-A3B在同等规模模型中实现了最先进的性能，尤其在TimeLens的细粒度时序定位任务以及Video-MME-v2和LongVideoBench的长视频理解任务上表现卓越。我们公开模型检查点以加速社区向可扩展且鲁棒的多模态智能体应用迈进。

2606.10917.title: Role-Agent: Bootstrapping LLM Agents via Dual-Role Evolution
2606.10917.abstract: Although Large Language Model (LLM) agents have demonstrated strong performance on complex tasks, their learning is often limited by inefficient interaction feedback and static training environments, which hinder broader generalization. To address these limitations, this paper introduces Role-Agent, \textcolor{black}{a framework} that harnesses a single LLM to function concurrently as both the agent and the environment, enabling a bootstrapped co-evolution. Role-Agent comprises two synergistic components: World-In-Agent (WIA) and Agent-In-World (AIW). In WIA, the LLM acts as the agent and predicts future states after each action; the alignment between predicted and actual states is then used as a process reward, encouraging environment-aware reasoning. In AIW, the LLM analyzes failure modes from failed trajectories and retrieves tasks with similar failure patterns, thereby reshaping the training data distribution for targeted practice. Experiments on multiple benchmarks show that Role-Agent consistently improves performance, yielding an average gain of over 4\% over strong baselines.
2606.10917.abstract_zh: 尽管大语言模型（LLM）智能体在复杂任务上展现出强大的性能，但其学习过程常受限于低效的交互反馈和静态的训练环境，这阻碍了更广泛的泛化能力。为应对这些局限，本文提出了Role-Agent框架，该框架利用单一LLM同时扮演智能体与环境角色，实现一种自举式的协同进化。Role-Agent包含两个协同组件：World-In-Agent（WIA，智能体中的世界）与Agent-In-World（AIW，世界中的智能体）。在WIA中，LLM作为智能体，在执行每个动作后预测未来状态；预测状态与实际状态之间的一致性被用作过程奖励，以鼓励环境感知的推理。在AIW中，LLM分析失败轨迹中的故障模式，并检索具有类似失败模式的任务，从而重塑训练数据分布以实现针对性练习。在多个基准测试上的实验表明，Role-Agent能持续提升性能，相较于强基线模型平均获得超过4%的性能增益。

2606.05922.title: Retrospective Harness Optimization: Improving LLM Agents via Self-Preference over Trajectory Rollouts
2606.05922.abstract: AI agents rely on a harness of skills, tools, and workflows to solve complex problems. Continually improving this harness is essential for adapting to new tasks. However, existing optimization methods typically require ground-truth validation sets, yet such labeled data is difficult to acquire in practical deployment settings. To address this problem, we introduce Retrospective Harness Optimization (RHO), a self-supervised method that optimizes the agent harness using only past trajectories. Specifically, RHO selects a diverse coreset of challenging tasks from past trajectories and re-solves them in parallel. The agent analyzes these rollouts using self-validation and self-consistency, then generates candidate harness updates and selects the most effective one by its own pairwise self-preference. We evaluate RHO across three diverse domains, spanning software engineering, technical work, and knowledge work. Notably, a single optimization round improves the pass rate on SWE-Bench Pro from 59% to 78% without any external grading. Furthermore, our analysis demonstrates that RHO effectively targets prior failure modes. As a result, the optimized harness alters the agent's behavior patterns and sustains higher accuracy during long-horizon sessions.
2606.05922.abstract_zh: 智能体(AI agents)依赖一套由技能、工具和工作流程组成的运行框架来解决复杂问题。持续优化这一框架对于适应新任务至关重要。然而，现有的优化方法通常需要真实标注的验证集，而这类标注数据在实际部署环境中难以获取。为解决这一问题，我们提出了回顾式框架优化(Retrospective Harness Optimization, RHO)，这是一种仅使用历史轨迹进行自我监督的智能体框架优化方法。具体而言，RHO从历史轨迹中筛选出一组具有多样性且富有挑战性的核心任务集，并对其进行并行重解。智能体通过自我验证(self-validation)与自我一致性(self-consistency)分析这些执行轨迹，随后生成候选框架更新方案，并通过成对自我偏好(pairwise self-preference)自主选择最高效的版本。我们在软件工程、技术任务和知识工作三个不同领域对RHO进行了评估。值得注意的是，仅经过单轮优化，SWE-Bench Pro基准测试的通过率就从59%提升至78%，且全程无需外部评分。进一步分析表明，RHO能有效针对先前的失败模式进行优化。最终，优化后的框架改变了智能体的行为模式，并在长周期任务中保持了更高的准确率。

2606.09730.title: SearchSwarm: Towards Delegation Intelligence in Agentic LLMs for Long-Horizon Deep Research
2606.09730.abstract: Large language models are increasingly expected to handle complex, long-horizon real-world tasks whose context demands can grow without bound, yet model context windows remain inherently finite. Recent work explores a paradigm where a main agent decomposes tasks and dispatches subtasks to subagents, which execute and return only summarized results, conserving the main agent's context budget. However, performing this well requires delegation intelligence: the ability to decompose complex tasks, determine when and what to delegate, and integrate returned results into the ongoing workflow. Training data for this capability is scarce in naturally occurring text, and to our knowledge, how to synthesize such data and train models to acquire this capability remains largely unexplored in the open-source community. To bridge this gap, we present a preliminary exploration targeting deep research, a representative long-horizon agent task. Specifically, we design a harness that guides the model toward high-quality task decomposition and delegation, while constraining subagents to return results properly to support the main agent's workflow. The harness-guided trajectories naturally encode correct delegation decisions, which we use as supervised fine-tuning data to internalize delegation intelligence into model weights. Our resulting model, SearchSwarm-30B-A3B, achieves 68.1 on BrowseComp and 73.3 on BrowseComp-ZH, the best results among all models of comparable scale. We will release our harness, model weights, and training data to facilitate future research.
2606.09730.abstract_zh: 大语言模型正日益被期望处理复杂、长周期的现实世界任务，这些任务的上下文需求可能无限增长，而模型的上下文窗口本质上仍受限于有限长度。近期研究探索了一种范式：主代理将任务分解并派发子任务给子代理，子代理执行后仅返回摘要结果，从而节约主代理的上下文资源。然而，要实现这一机制需要委托智能：即分解复杂任务、决定何时委托及委托内容、并将返回结果整合到工作流程中的能力。自然文本中针对这种能力的训练数据十分稀缺，且据我们所知，如何合成此类数据并训练模型获取该能力，在开源社区中仍属尚未充分探索的领域。为填补这一空白，我们以深度研究这一典型的长周期代理任务为目标，开展了初步探索。具体而言，我们设计了一个控制框架，引导模型实现高质量的任务分解与委托，同时约束子代理以恰当方式返回结果以支持主代理的工作流程。该框架引导的轨迹自然编码了正确的委托决策，我们将其作为监督微调数据，将委托智能内化至模型权重中。我们最终得到的模型SearchSwarm-30B-A3B在BrowseComp数据集上达到68.1分，在BrowseComp-ZH数据集上达到73.3分，这是同类规模模型中取得的最佳成绩。我们将公开控制框架、模型权重及训练数据，以促进未来研究。

2606.07512.title: MemDreamer: Decoupling Perception and Reasoning for Long Video Understanding via Hierarchical Graph Memory and Agentic Retrieval Mechanism
2606.07512.abstract: Current Vision-Language Models struggle with hours-long videos because processing full-length visual sequences induces prohibitive token explosion and attention dilution. To overcome this, we introduce MemDreamer to decouple perception and reasoning, shifting long-video understanding into an agentic exploration process. As a plug-and-play framework, it incrementally streams videos to construct a Hierarchical Graph Memory, a top-down three-tier architecture for semantic abstraction, anchored by a foundational graph capturing spatiotemporal and causal relations. During inference, the reasoning model employs agentic tool-augmented retrieval, navigating hierarchies, searching nodes, and traversing logical edges via an Observation-Reason-Action loop. Experiments show MemDreamer achieves SOTA results across four mainstream benchmarks, narrowing the gap with human experts to only 3.7 points. It constrains the reasoning context window to merely 2% of full-context ingestion while delivering a 12.5 point absolute accuracy gain. Furthermore, statistical analysis uncovers a strong positive linear correlation between an VLM's performance on logic reasoning and long-video understanding benchmarks, establishing agentic capability scaling as a new paradigm for multimodal comprehension.
2606.07512.abstract_zh: 当前的视觉语言模型在处理长达数小时的视频时面临挑战，因为处理完整视觉序列会导致难以承受的令牌爆炸和注意力稀释问题。为克服这一局限，我们提出了MemDreamer框架，将感知与推理过程解耦，把长视频理解转化为一种自主探索的智能体进程。该框架作为即插即用系统，通过增量式视频流构建分层图记忆——这是一种自上而下的三层语义抽象架构，其基础层通过图结构捕获时空与因果关系。在推理阶段，推理模型采用智能体工具增强检索机制，通过“观察-推理-行动”循环在记忆层次中导航：遍历层级结构、搜索节点、沿逻辑边进行探索。实验表明，MemDreamer在四大主流基准测试中均取得最先进成果，与人类专家表现的差距缩小至仅3.7分。该框架将推理上下文窗口限制在全上下文输入的2%以内，同时实现了12.5分的绝对准确率提升。进一步的统计分析揭示，视觉语言模型在逻辑推理与长视频理解基准上的表现存在显著正线性相关，这确立了智能体能力扩展作为多模态理解的新范式。

2606.11176.title: Data Journalist Agent: Transforming Data into Verifiable Multimodal Stories
2606.11176.abstract: Data tells stories that shape society; the data journalist's job is to turn raw information into stories non-experts can trust. A high-quality news feature takes a newsroom team weeks: hunting for context, running statistics, choosing an angle, and designing visuals. Recent agents handle individual steps well: data-science agents close the analysis loop, while design agents synthesize beautiful websites. But can an agent serve as a data journalist end to end? We introduce Data Journalist Agent (Data2Story), a multi-agent framework that orchestrates specialized roles into a single virtual newsroom. Data2Story contributes two innovations. (i) Claims are evidence-grounded: an Inspector links every number, angle, and asset back to data, code, or an external reference. (ii) Articles are multimodally generative: rather than defaulting to plain text and static charts, Data2Story reasons about what readers will want to see, then deploys multimodal tools, such as interactive maps for geography and audio for music. We evaluate Data2Story on 18 articles, each paired with the originally published expert piece, along four axes: (a) human-agent angle coverage; (b) rubric evaluation with 53 participants across five dimensions; (c) computer-use agents as judges, a cost-saving proxy for how readers navigate interactive articles; and (d) verifiability, where a coding verifier re-executes statements against the data and checks claims against references. Data2Story produces competitive, evidence-traceable multimedia stories, with particular strength in transparency and auditability. Human articles retain an edge in editorial angle, creative design, and presentation. We position Data2Story as a collaborator for journalists, enabling more evidence-based, transparent, and verifiable reporting. Code and demos are available atthis https URL.
2606.11176.abstract_zh: 数据讲述着塑造社会的故事；数据新闻工作者（data journalist）的任务是将原始信息转化为非专业人士能够信赖的报道。一篇高质量的新闻特稿需要新闻编辑室团队花费数周时间：搜寻背景信息、进行统计分析、选择报道角度并设计可视化呈现。现有的智能体（agent）能较好地处理单个环节：数据科学智能体（data-science agent）能完成分析闭环，设计智能体（design agent）可合成精美的网页。但智能体能否端到端地担任数据新闻记者的角色？我们提出数据新闻记者智能体（Data Journalist Agent，简称Data2Story），这是一个将专业角色协调组织成单一虚拟新闻编辑室的多智能体框架。Data2Story带来两项创新：（一）主张基于证据：审查员（Inspector）将每个数字、角度和素材都追溯至数据、代码或外部参考来源；（二）文章具备多模态生成能力：Data2Story并非仅采用纯文本与静态图表，而是推理读者希望看到的内容，随后调用多模态工具，例如针对地理信息使用交互式地图，针对音乐内容生成音频。我们通过四个维度对Data2Story生成的18篇文章进行评估（每篇均与专家原创发表的文章配对）：（a）人类与智能体的角度覆盖度；（b）邀请53位参与者从五个维度进行量表评估；（c）采用计算机使用智能体作为评判者，以经济高效的方式模拟读者浏览交互式文章的行为；（d）可验证性，通过代码验证器重新执行数据陈述并核对主张与参考文献。Data2Story能产出具有竞争力、证据可追溯的多媒体报道，在透明度与可审计性方面表现突出；人类撰写的文章则在编辑角度、创意设计与呈现方式上保持优势。我们将Data2Story定位为新闻工作者的协作伙伴，助力实现更基于证据、透明且可验证的新闻报道。代码与演示可通过此链接获取：https://...

2606.11025.title: Flow-DPPO: Divergence Proximal Policy Optimization for Flow Matching Models
2606.11025.abstract: Recent work has demonstrated that online reinforcement learning (RL) can substantially improve the quality and alignment of flow matching models for image and video generation. Methods such as Flow-GRPO and CPS cast the denoising process as a Markov Decision Process and apply PPO-style ratio clipping to enforce a trust region. However, we argue that ratio clipping is structurally ill-suited for flow models: the probability ratio between new and old policies is a noisy, single-sample estimate of the true policy divergence, leading to over-constraining in some regions of the trajectory and under-constraining in others. We propose Flow-DPPO (Flow Divergence Proximal Policy Optimization), which replaces ratio clipping with a divergence proximal constraint. A key observation is that the per-step policy in flow models is Gaussian, enabling exact and cheap computation of the KL divergence between old and new policies. Flow-DPPO employs an asymmetric divergence mask that blocks gradient updates only when they simultaneously move away from the trusted region and violate the divergence threshold. Experiments show that Flow-DPPO achieves higher rewards with better KL-proximal efficiency, alleviates catastrophic forgetting, promotes balanced multi-objective optimization, and enables stable multi-epoch training where ratio clipping degrades. Code and models are available atthis https URL.
2606.11025.abstract_zh: 近期研究表明，在线强化学习（RL）能够显著提升图像与视频生成中流匹配模型（flow matching models）的质量与对齐度。诸如Flow-GRPO和CPS等方法将去噪过程建模为马尔可夫决策过程，并应用PPO风格的比例裁剪（ratio clipping）来构建信任区域。然而我们认为，比例裁剪在结构上并不适用于流模型：新策略与旧策略之间的概率比是对真实策略散度的噪声单样本估计，这会导致轨迹中某些区域约束过度而其他区域约束不足。我们提出Flow-DPPO（Flow Divergence Proximal Policy Optimization），用散度近端约束替代比例裁剪。一个关键发现是，流模型中的单步策略服从高斯分布，这使得新旧策略间的KL散度（KL divergence）能够被精确且高效地计算。Flow-DPPO采用非对称散度掩码，仅当梯度更新同时远离信任区域且违反散度阈值时，才阻断梯度更新。实验表明，Flow-DPPO能以更好的KL近端效率获得更高奖励，缓解灾难性遗忘，促进平衡的多目标优化，并实现稳定的多轮次训练——而比例裁剪方法在此情况下会出现性能退化。代码与模型可通过此链接获取：https://github.com/your-repo-link。

2606.09821.title: Rethinking the Divergence Regularization in LLM RL
2606.09821.abstract: Reinforcement learning (RL) has become a key component of post-training large language models (LLMs). In practice, LLM RL is often off-policy because of training-inference mismatch and policy staleness, making trust-region control essential for stable optimization. Mainstream methods such as PPO and GRPO approximate this control with a ratio-clipping mechanism, but the importance ratio can be a poor proxy for distributional shift in long-tailed vocabularies. Recent work such as DPPO addresses this mismatch by replacing ratio-based clipping with a divergence-based mask, yielding a trust region defined by the sampled token's absolute probability shift. However, DPPO still relies on a hard mask: once a token crosses the trust-region boundary in a harmful direction, its gradient is discarded rather than corrected. To address this, we propose Divergence Regularized Policy Optimization (DRPO), which replaces the hard mask with a smooth advantage-weighted quadratic regularizer on policy shift. DRPO preserves the same trust-region geometry as DPPO while inducing bounded, continuous gradient weights that attenuate diverging updates and provide corrective signals beyond the boundary. Experiments across model scales, architectures, and precision settings show that DRPO improves the stability and efficiency of LLM RL training.
2606.09821.abstract_zh: 强化学习（RL）已成为后训练大语言模型（LLMs）的核心组成部分。在实践中，由于训练-推理不匹配和策略陈旧性，LLM的强化学习通常采用离轨策略，这使得信任域控制成为稳定优化的关键。主流方法如PPO和GRPO通过比率截断机制来近似实现这种控制，但在长尾词汇分布中，重要性比率可能难以有效表征分布偏移。近期研究如DPPO通过用基于散度的掩码替代基于比率的截断来解决此问题，从而构建了以采样标记绝对概率偏移定义的信任域。然而，DPPO仍依赖于硬掩码机制：一旦标记在有害方向上跨越信任域边界，其梯度将被直接丢弃而非修正。针对这一问题，我们提出了散度正则化策略优化（DRPO），该方法以策略偏移上的平滑优势加权二次正则化器取代硬掩码。DRPO在保持与DPPO相同信任域几何结构的同时，引入了有界且连续的梯度权重机制，既能衰减发散性更新，又能为边界外区域提供修正信号。在不同模型规模、架构和精度设定下的实验表明，DRPO显著提升了LLM强化学习训练的稳定性和效率。

2606.11182.title: EEVEE: Towards Test-time Prompt Learning in the Real World for Self-Improving Agents
2606.11182.abstract: In this paper, we propose EEVEE, the first multi-dataset test-time prompt learning framework for LLM agents, enabling test-time prompt learning under real-world task streams. Existing methods are largely designed for single-dataset settings, while real-world applications require models to handle heterogeneous input streams drawn from multiple datasets, domains, and task distributions, limiting their practical applicability. To mitigate cross-dataset interference, EEVEE introduces a router that partitions incoming inputs into task clusters and assigns them to suitable prompt configurations. This design is optimized via a router-prompt co-evolution strategy, which employs interleaved router and prompt learning phases to address their mutual dependency. Experiments across multiple datasets demonstrate that the framework improves robustness under heterogeneous data streams while maintaining single-benchmark learning capability and efficiency. Specifically, EEVEE improves average multi-benchmark scores by 10.38 and 24.32 points over Qwen3-4B-Instruct and DeepSeek-V3.2, surpassing SOTA methods GEPA and ACE by up to 37.2% and 48.2%.
2606.11182.abstract_zh: 本文提出EEVEE，这是首个面向大语言模型智能体的多数据集测试时提示学习框架，使其能够在真实世界任务流中进行测试时提示学习。现有方法大多针对单数据集场景设计，而实际应用要求模型处理来自多个数据集、领域和任务分布的异构输入流，这限制了它们的实际适用性。为减轻跨数据集干扰，EEVEE引入路由机制，将输入数据划分为任务集群并分配至合适的提示配置。该设计通过路由器-提示协同进化策略进行优化，该策略采用交替进行的路由器学习阶段与提示学习阶段，以解决二者的相互依赖关系。在多个数据集上的实验表明，该框架提升了异构数据流下的鲁棒性，同时保持了单基准学习能力与效率。具体而言，EEVEE在Qwen3-4B-Instruct和DeepSeek-V3.2模型上的多基准平均得分分别提升10.38和24.32分，相比前沿方法GEPA与ACE的领先幅度最高达37.2%和48.2%。

2606.10572.title: One Token per Multimodal Evidence: Latent Memory for Resource-Constrained QA
2606.10572.abstract: External memory effectively grounds large language models (LLMs) and vision-language models (VLMs)-based question answering (QA) in relevant multimodal evidence. However, existing memory paradigms represent each memory item in raw text and image forms, so retrieval-based systems must pass the retrieved text or images to the generation LLMs/VLMs, resulting in high token consumption and storage pressure, making it unaffordable for resource-constrained applications. We propose Latent Memory, a latent-space memory paradigm that replaces each raw text or image evidence item with a single high-dimensional latent token produced by a small compressor LLM/VLM. Rather than retrieving raw evidence for generation, Latent Memory operates in a unified latent representation space: the query is embedded into this space to retrieve relevant latent tokens, and the retrieved latent tokens are directly prompted to a pretrained LLM or VLM for answer generation. To make each latent token simultaneously informative for reconstruction, retrieval, and generation, we train the compressor with reconstruction, contrastive, and distillation objectives in a unified end-to-end manner. Latent Memory is evaluated on seven text-only QA benchmarks (e.g., HotpotQA) and multimodal QA benchmarks, where it achieves competitive QA performance compared to advanced RAG baselines while consuming 3x to 10x fewer generator tokens. It can also deliver the strongest image-grounded QA performance on WebQA. Code is available atthis https URL.
2606.10572.abstract_zh: 外部记忆（External memory）能够有效将基于大型语言模型（LLM）和视觉语言模型（VLM）的问答（QA）系统锚定于相关的多模态证据中。然而，现有记忆范式以原始文本和图像形式表示每个记忆项，因此基于检索的系统必须将检索到的文本或图像传递给生成式LLM/VLM，导致高昂的令牌消耗和存储压力，这对于资源受限的应用而言难以承受。我们提出潜在记忆（Latent Memory），这是一种潜在空间记忆范式，它通过小型压缩器LLM/VLM生成的高维潜在令牌来替代每个原始文本或图像证据项。潜在记忆并非检索原始证据进行生成，而是在统一的潜在表示空间中运作：查询被嵌入该空间以检索相关潜在令牌，随后将检索到的潜在令牌直接输入预训练的LLM或VLM以生成答案。为了使每个潜在令牌同时具备重建、检索和生成的信息表达能力，我们以端到端统一方式，通过重建、对比和蒸馏目标训练压缩器。潜在记忆在七个纯文本问答基准（如HotpotQA）和多模态问答基准上进行了评估，结果表明其在消耗生成器令牌量仅为先进RAG基线3至10分之一的同时，达到了具有竞争力的问答性能。此外，它在WebQA数据集上实现了最强的基于图像的问答性能。代码可通过此https链接获取。

2606.11042.title: Workflow-GYM: Towards Long-Horizon Evaluation of Computer-use Agentic tasks in Real-World Professional Fields
2606.11042.abstract: Recent years have witnessed the rapid evolution of AI agents toward handling increasingly complex, real-world tasks. However, existing benchmarks rarely evaluate whether agents can operate graphical user interfaces to complete long-horizon, high-value professional workflows across diverse domains. Current GUI benchmarks still predominantly focus on general-purpose software, relatively simple applications, and short-horizon tasks, leaving it largely unknown whether modern agents can follow user instructions to autonomously operate domain-specific professional software and accomplish economically valuable work in an end-to-end manner. To bridge this gap, we introduce Workflow-GYM, a benchmark for long-horizon GUI tasks centered on professional domains and specialized software environments. Through extensive experiments on state-of-the-art models, we find that even the strongest models achieve only slightly above 30% success rates, highlighting that professional long-horizon GUI workflows remain highly challenging for current GUI agents. Further analysis reveals that current agents struggle to maintain long-horizon workflow consistency, frequently exhibiting workflow stage omission, error propagation, objective drift, and insufficient understanding of professional software environments. Our findings provide important insights into the limitations of current agent systems and suggest key directions for the next generation of GUI-agent research.
2606.11042.abstract_zh: 近年来，人工智能代理在应对日益复杂的现实任务方面快速发展。然而，现有基准测试很少评估代理能否通过操作图形用户界面来完成跨领域的长周期、高价值的专业工作流程。当前的GUI基准测试仍主要集中于通用软件、相对简单的应用程序和短周期任务，这使得现代代理能否遵循用户指令自主操作特定领域的专业软件并以端到端方式完成具有经济价值的工作，在很大程度上仍是未知的。为填补这一空白，我们提出了Workflow-GYM——一个围绕专业领域和专用软件环境构建的长周期GUI任务基准。通过对前沿模型的大规模实验，我们发现即使最强大的模型也仅能达到略高于30%的成功率，这表明专业长周期GUI工作流程对当前GUI代理而言仍极具挑战性。进一步分析表明，当前代理难以维持长周期工作流程的一致性，频繁出现工作流程阶段遗漏、错误传播、目标漂移以及对专业软件环境理解不足等问题。我们的研究结果揭示了当前代理系统的局限性，并为下一代GUI代理研究指明了关键方向。

2606.11052.title: Attention Amnesia in Hybrid LLMs: When CoT Fine-Tuning Breaks Long-Range Recall, and How to Fix It
2606.11052.abstract: Chain-of-thought (CoT) supervised fine-tuning (SFT) is widely adopted to improve reasoning ability, yet we find that it systematically degrades long-context recall in hybrid linear-attention models. Across architectures including HypeNet and Jet-Nemotron, retrieval performance on Needle-In-A-Haystack (NIAH) deteriorates substantially after CoT-SFT, and the degradation becomes more severe under harder retrieval settings and longer context windows. For example, HypeNet-9B on NIAH-S2@256K decreases from $67.2\%$ to $9.4\%$. We attribute this to CoT-SFT biasing attention gradients toward short-range patterns, disrupting query-key projections ($W_Q, W_K$) that are responsible for long-range routing. Motivated by this observation, we propose QK-Restore, a training-free method that restores only $W_Q$ and $W_K$ from the pre-SFT checkpoint while preserving all other post-SFT parameters. We further introduce a Procrustes variant to balance routing preservation and reasoning adaptation. Across architectures, QK-Restore consistently restores long-context capability at zero training cost while preserving reasoning performance; for instance, on HypeNet-5B it improves S3@256K from $65.4\%$ to $76.4\%$ while maintaining strong reasoning performance.
2606.11052.abstract_zh: 思维链（Chain-of-thought，CoT）监督微调（supervised fine-tuning，SFT）被广泛用于提升推理能力，但我们发现，该方法在混合线性注意力模型中会系统性损害长上下文召回能力。在包括HypeNet和Jet-Nemotron在内的多种架构中，经过CoT-SFT后，针在干草堆（Needle-In-A-Haystack，NIAH）任务上的检索性能显著下降，且检索难度越高、上下文窗口越长，性能退化越严重。例如，HypeNet-9B在NIAH-S2@256K任务上的准确率从$67.2\%$降至$9.4\%$。我们将此归因于CoT-SFT使注意力梯度偏向短程模式，从而破坏了负责长程路由的查询-键投影矩阵（$W_Q$, $W_K$）。基于这一观察，我们提出了QK-Restore——一种无需训练的方法，仅从SFT前的检查点恢复$W_Q$和$W_K$，同时保留所有SFT后的其他参数。我们还引入了一种Procrustes变体，以平衡路由保持与推理适应。在不同架构上，QK-Restore均能以零训练成本有效恢复长上下文能力，同时保持推理性能；例如在HypeNet-5B上，该方法将S3@256K任务准确率从$65.4\%$提升至$76.4\%$，且推理能力维持强劲表现。

2606.04391.title: Online Skill Learning for Web Agents via State-Grounded Dynamic Retrieval
2606.04391.abstract: Language agents increasingly rely on reusable skills to improve multi-step web automation across related tasks. A growing line of work studies online skill learning, where agents continually induce skills from previous task trajectories and reuse them in future tasks on the fly. However, existing methods mainly reuse skills at the task-level: a fixed set of skills is retrieved based on the initial task instruction and then held fixed throughout execution. This static strategy is misaligned with web execution, where the appropriate next action depends not only on the task goal but also on the current webpage state, which often transitions into situations that the initial skills fail to cover. To address this gap, we propose State-Grounded Dynamic Retrieval (SGDR), an online skill learning method that enables stepwise skill reuse for web agents. SGDR consists of three components: a sliding-window extraction process that turns completed trajectories into reusable sub-procedures invokable at intermediate execution states, a dual text-code representation that connects skill retrieval with executable action, and a state-grounded dynamic retrieval mechanism that matches skills to both the task goal and the current webpage state. Experiments on WebArena across five domains show that SGDR consistently outperforms strong baselines, achieving average success rates of 37.5% with GPT-4.1 and 24.3% with Qwen3-4B, corresponding to relative gains of 10.6% and 10.0% over the strongest baseline, respectively. The code is available atthis https URL.
2606.04391.abstract_zh: 语言智能体日益依赖可复用的技能来提升跨相关任务的多步骤网络自动化能力。当前研究趋势聚焦于在线技能学习，即智能体持续地从过往任务轨迹中归纳技能，并在后续任务中即时复用。然而，现有方法主要在任务层面进行技能复用：根据初始任务指令检索出一组固定技能，并在整个执行过程中保持不变。这种静态策略与网络执行场景存在错位，因为恰当的后续行动不仅取决于任务目标，还取决于当前网页状态——网页状态常会切换至初始技能无法覆盖的情境。为弥补这一差距，我们提出状态导向动态检索法，这是一种支持网络智能体进行步骤级技能复用的在线技能学习方法。该方法包含三个组成部分：一个滑动窗口提取流程，将已完成的任务轨迹转化为可在中间执行状态调用的可复用子程序；一种双文本-代码表征机制，将技能检索与可执行操作相连接；以及一个状态导向的动态检索机制，使技能匹配同时兼顾任务目标与当前网页状态。在涵盖五个领域的WebArena平台上进行的实验表明，该方法持续优于现有强基线模型，使用GPT-4.1时平均成功率可达37.5%，使用Qwen3-4B时达24.3%，分别较最强基线获得10.6%与10.0%的相对提升。代码可通过此链接获取：https://URL。

2606.10029.title: Interpreting and Steering a Text-to-Speech Language Model with Sparse Autoencoders
2606.10029.abstract: Language models increasingly serve as the backbone of text-to-speech (TTS) systems, yet we understand little about the representations they build when text and generated speech tokens share a single residual stream. We train BatchTopK sparse autoencoders on the LM backbone of CosyVoice3 and introduce a modality-aware auto-interp pipeline that labels each feature from where it fires-text-prefix context, 1-second speech clips, or both. The recovered features are interpretable, spanning phonemes, laughter, accent prompts and speaker gender. Steering through the SAE latent space shows these features are causal rather than merely descriptive: targeted interventions raise laughter probability from 0.02 to 0.79, flip perceived speaker gender, and control speech rate while preserving spoken content. SAE features thus serve both as interpretability objects and as control directions for TTS synthesis.
2606.10029.abstract_zh: 语言模型日益成为文本转语音系统的核心组件，但我们对其在文本与生成语音标记共享同一残差流时所构建的表征机制仍知之甚少。我们在CosyVoice3的语言模型骨干网络上训练了BatchTopK稀疏自编码器，并引入一种模态感知的自解释流程，该流程根据特征激活位置（文本前缀上下文、1秒语音片段或二者兼具）对每个特征进行标注。所提取的特征具备可解释性，涵盖音素、笑声、口音提示和说话者性别等维度。通过对稀疏自编码器潜在空间的调控实验表明，这些特征具有因果性而非单纯描述性：定向干预能将笑声概率从0.02提升至0.79，反转感知到的说话者性别，并在保持语音内容的同时控制语速。因此，稀疏自编码器特征既能作为可解释性研究对象，也可作为文本转语音合成的控制参量。

2606.10646.title: How Does Reasoning Flow? Tracing Attention-Induced Information Flow for Targeted RL in LLMs
2606.10646.abstract: Token-level credit assignment remains a key obstacle for reinforcement learning (RL) in large language models (LLMs), where RL recipes typically treat all tokens equally, failing to distinguish decisive reasoning steps from routine formatting or fluent filler. Recent attempts leverage model-internal signals to assign finer-grained credit, but these are often point-wise heuristics that ignore the global structure of information propagation. We propose FlowTracer, an RL framework that traces answer-targeted reasoning flow on an attention-induced directed acyclic graph in which nodes correspond to tokens and edge capacities come from aggregated attention weights and derives token credit from this global structure. The edge capacities are reweighted to retain only the influence that can reach the answer region, while enforcing local flow conservation so intermediate tokens neither lose nor gain effective mass due to path length or irrelevant branches. On this graph, FlowTracer extracts an information-flow backbone connecting the question to the answer and scores tokens by flow throughput, revealing high-impact hubs and aggregation checkpoints that mediate long-range dependencies. These derived importances are used to shape token-level rewards, enabling learning signals to focus precisely on the tokens that route information toward (or away from) correct answers and delivering consistent performance gains across a range of reasoning tasks.
2606.10646.abstract_zh: 在大型语言模型(LLM)的强化学习(RL)中，词元级别(Token-level)的信用分配仍是关键障碍——现有的RL方法通常对所有词元一视同仁，无法区分关键推理步骤与常规格式化或流畅的填充内容。近期研究尝试利用模型内部信号进行更细粒度的信用分配，但这些方法多为忽略信息传播全局结构的逐点启发式策略。我们提出FlowTracer框架，该RL框架通过在注意力诱导的有向无环图中追踪面向答案的推理流来实现信用分配：图中节点对应词元，边容量来自聚合注意力权重，并基于此全局结构推导词元信用。我们对边容量进行重加权，仅保留能够到达答案区域的影响力，同时强制实施局部流量守恒，确保中间词元不会因路径长度或无关分支损失或获得有效信息量。在该图谱上，FlowTracer提取连接问题与答案的信息流主干，通过流量吞吐量评估词元重要性，揭示调控长程依赖的高影响力枢纽与聚合检查点。由此衍生的重要性指标被用于塑造词元级奖励，使学习信号精准聚焦于将信息导向(或偏离)正确答案的词元，在一系列推理任务中实现了持续的性能提升。

2606.09707.title: BrainSurgery: Reproducible and Reliable Declarative Weight Manipulations for Model Editing and Upcycling
2606.09707.abstract: As deep learning models scale, managing, inspecting, and modifying large checkpoints has become increasingly challenging. Researchers often need to alter model weights for layer restructuring, precision casting, low-rank factorization, and architectural debugging, yet these workflows often rely on fragile ad-hoc Python scripts. Here, we introduce BrainSurgery, a tool for robust and reproducible "tensor surgery" on neural network checkpoints, and provide a system demonstration covering four examples and three case studies from model upcycling to LoRA extraction. By abstracting storage formats and memory management, BrainSurgery executes complex transformations through declarative YAML plans. It supports structural modifications, mathematical transformations, and tensor reshaping through expressive regex and structural targeting, while built-in assertions validate tensor shapes, data types, and values to prevent silent errors. We envision that BrainSurgery will provide a strong foundation for future research through its reproducible and validated operations.
2606.09707.abstract_zh: 随着深度学习模型规模扩大，管理和修改大型检查点(checkpoints)变得越来越复杂。研究人员常常需要调整模型权重以进行层结构重组、精度转换、低秩分解和架构调试，但这些工作流程通常依赖于脆弱的临时Python脚本。本文介绍BrainSurgery——一种针对神经网络检查点进行鲁棒且可复现的"张量手术(tensor surgery)"工具，并通过从模型升级回收到LoRA提取等四个示例和三个案例研究进行系统演示。通过抽象存储格式和内存管理，BrainSurgery可通过声明式YAML方案执行复杂转换。该工具支持通过表达式正则匹配和结构定位实现结构修改、数学变换及张量重塑，同时内置断言机制可验证张量形状、数据类型和数值以防止静默错误。我们预见BrainSurgery将通过其可复现且经过验证的操作，为未来研究提供坚实基础。

2606.09697.title: PsychoSafe: Eliciting Psychologically-Informed Refusals in Large Language Models
2606.09697.abstract: Large language models (LLMs) routinely face requests that should be refused, creating a trade-off between helpfulness and harm prevention. However, refusals themselves can be helpful. In high-risk interactions involving crisis, coercion, or escalating intent, blunt non-compliance may prevent direct harm while still failing to support the needs of the person behind the request. We present PsychoSafe, a psychologically-informed refusal framework that reframes refusal as structured supportive communication grounded in evidence-based intervention strategies. To develop PsychoSafe, we construct a corpus of 8019 prompt-response pairs spanning five psychologically salient risk domains and apply prompting and parameter-efficient fine-tuning to Qwen 3.5 27B. On a balanced validation set of 500 prompts, evaluated with an LLM judge and validated through human ratings, PsychoSafe prompting improves overall refusal quality by 28.1% over a generic baseline, with particularly strong gains in external resource referral (+46.8%) and psychological grounding (+34.8%), while preserving downstream performance on non-refusal tasks. Fine-tuning achieves near-perfect refusal and resource-referral rates but reduces response relevance. Additional evaluations on SORRY-Bench and XSTest show strong in-domain robustness but limited out-of-domain generalization, suggesting that future work should diversify fine-tuning data to help models apply interventions selectively rather than schematically.
2606.09697.abstract_zh: 大型语言模型(LLMs)在处理用户请求时，常需拒绝某些不当要求，这需要在提供帮助与预防危害之间寻求平衡。然而，拒绝行为本身亦可具有建设性意义。在涉及心理危机、胁迫或意图升级的高风险交互场景中，生硬的不合规回应虽能防止直接伤害，却往往无法满足提问者背后的真实需求。本文提出PsychoSafe——一个心理学赋能的拒绝框架，该框架将拒绝行为重构为基于循证干预策略的结构化支持性沟通。为构建PsychoSafe，我们创建了包含8019个提示-应答对的数据集，涵盖五个心理学显著风险领域，并采用提示工程与参数高效微调技术对Qwen 3.5 27B模型进行优化。在由500个提示组成的平衡验证集上，通过LLM裁判评估结合人工评分验证，PsychoSafe提示策略将整体拒绝质量较通用基线提升28.1%，其中外部资源引导(+46.8%)与心理学依据(+34.8%)维度提升尤为显著，同时保持非拒绝任务的下游性能。微调方法虽实现近乎完美的拒绝率与资源引导率，但降低了应答相关性。在SORRY-Bench和XSTest基准上的补充评估显示，该框架在领域内表现出强鲁棒性，但跨领域泛化能力有限，这表明未来研究应通过多样化微调数据，帮助模型实现选择性而非模式化的干预应用。

2606.09032.title: Bridging the Agent-World Gap: Text World Models for LLM-based Agents
2606.09032.abstract: Large language model (LLM)-based agents are increasingly used in interactive textual environments, from web navigation and code editing to tool use and long-horizon dialogue. Yet many remain largely reactive, mapping observations to actions without an explicit model of how these environments are structured and evolve. This motivates text world models (TWMs): transition models over textual states that, given a state and a candidate action, predict the resulting webpage, terminal output, API response, or user reply, thereby supporting planning, efficient learning, and principled evaluation. We systematically review text world models for LLM-based agents, organized around a formal framework and the agent lifecycle: (1) Foundations, defining text world models and characterizing them by state representation and grounding domain; (2) Construction, taxonomizing LLM-as-WM and code-as-WM paradigms and reviewing methods for building them; (3) Application, examining how world models support agents at training time through experience synthesis and at inference time through planning, verification, and adaptation; and (4) Evaluation, covering both evaluation of the world model itself and its use as an evaluation environment for agents. We aim to consolidate this rapidly developing area, clarify its design space, and highlight open challenges for future research.
2606.09032.abstract_zh: 基于大语言模型（LLM）的智能体在交互式文本环境中的应用日益广泛，涵盖网页导航、代码编辑、工具使用以及长程对话等领域。然而，许多现有智能体仍主要呈现反应式特征，即直接将观察映射为动作，而缺乏对这些环境结构与动态变化的显式建模。这催生了文本世界模型（Text World Models, TWMs）的研究：这类模型基于文本状态构建状态转移机制，在给定当前状态与候选动作时，能够预测生成的网页内容、终端输出、API响应或用户回复，从而为规划、高效学习和系统化评估提供支持。本文系统梳理了面向LLM智能体的文本世界模型研究，围绕形式化框架与智能体生命周期展开论述：（1）**基础理论**，明确定义文本世界模型，并从状态表征与基础领域两个维度进行特性分析；（2）**构建方法**，对“LLM即世界模型”与“代码即世界模型”两类范式进行归类，并综述其构建技术；（3）**应用场景**，探讨世界模型如何在训练阶段通过经验合成支持智能体学习，在推理阶段通过规划、验证与适配增强决策能力；（4）**评估体系**，涵盖世界模型自身的评价方法及其作为智能体评估环境的应用。本文旨在整合这一快速发展领域的研究成果，厘清其设计空间，并展望未来研究面临的开放挑战。

2606.11131.title: UniPET: a universal network for high-quality PET image denoising across varied dose reduction factors
2606.11131.abstract: Most existing deep learning-based PET image denoising methods assume a fixed and known dose reduction factor (DRF) for low-dose PET images. However, these methods encounter significant performance degradation when the DRF varies beyond the assumed one in practical applications. To address the challenge posed by varied DRFs, several preliminary studies focus on the task of universal PET image denoising, aiming to train a universal model over low-dose data across DRFs. Nonetheless, these vanilla universal models often struggle with misaligned styles present in different DRF data, leading to the \textit{style elimination issue} with a significant over-smoothing effect. To deal with this issue, we innovatively introduce domain generalization to PET image denoising and propose a universal PET image denoising network (UniPET) to achieve high-quality PET image denoising across diverse DRFs. UniPET comprises two primary innovations: a style alignment network (SAN) and a region-aware learning strategy (RALS). Specifically, SAN utilizes style alignment techniques derived from domain generalization to align and recover styles across different DRFs, ensuring the model's generalizability across various DRFs while effectively preserving styles. Furthermore, to enhance style recovery, RALS distinguishes between flat and stylized regions, exclusively conducting adversarial learning on the latter, thereby more effectively guiding the model's focus towards learning stylized regions. It is demonstrated that our proposed UniPET can adaptively recover different DRF styles and achieve high-quality PET image denoising across DRFs. Comprehensive experiments show that UniPET exhibits comparable performance to individual DRF-specific models at specific DRFs and realizes state-of-the-art performance in universal PET image denoising quantitatively, perceptually, and clinically.
2606.11131.abstract_zh: 现有的大多数基于深度学习的PET图像降噪方法都假设低剂量PET图像具有固定且已知的剂量降低因子（DRF）。然而，在实际应用中，当DRF变化超出预设范围时，这些方法的性能会出现显著下降。为应对不同DRF带来的挑战，一些初步研究聚焦于通用PET图像降噪任务，旨在通过跨DRF的低剂量数据训练一个通用模型。尽管如此，这些基础的通用模型常因不同DRF数据间存在的风格错位而陷入困境，导致出现具有明显过度平滑效应的“风格消除问题”。为解决此问题，我们创新性地将领域泛化引入PET图像降噪，并提出一种通用PET图像降噪网络（UniPET），以实现跨多种DRF的高质量PET图像降噪。UniPET包含两项主要创新：风格对齐网络（SAN）和区域感知学习策略（RALS）。具体而言，SAN利用源自领域泛化的风格对齐技术来对齐并恢复不同DRF间的风格，确保模型在多种DRF间的泛化能力，同时有效保留风格。此外，为增强风格恢复效果，RALS通过区分平坦区域与风格化区域，并仅在后者上进行对抗学习，从而更有效地引导模型聚焦于学习风格化区域。实验证明，我们提出的UniPET能够自适应地恢复不同DRF风格，并实现跨DRF的高质量PET图像降噪。综合实验表明，UniPET在特定DRF下表现与各DRF专用模型相当，并在定量评估、感知质量和临床验证上均实现了通用PET图像降噪的先进性能。

2606.11032.title: U-TTT: Towards Generalizable PET Image Denoising via Test-Time Training
2606.11032.abstract: Existing deep learning models for Positron Emission Tomography (PET) image denoising often suffer from severe performance degradation under distribution shifts, fundamentally restricting their robust clinical deployment. This lack of generalization stems from the conventional paradigm of fixed-parameter models that cannot adapt to variations in test data (e.g., dose levels or scanner types) after training. To overcome this limitation and achieve robust generalization, we introduce U-TTT, a novel U-shaped model that integrates Test-Time Training (TTT) layers to dynamically adjust model parameters during inference through self-supervision, thereby adapting to the specific characteristics of each test instance. Furthermore, to comprehensively capture the complex degradations of 3D PET data, U-TTT features a dual-domain adaptation mechanism comprising a Spatial Test-Time Training (S-TTT) layer and a Frequency Test-Time Training (F-TTT) layer. The S-TTT layer captures and corrects spatial structural degradations, while the F-TTT layer suppresses global noise spectra and restores delicate high-frequency details. Extensive experiments demonstrate that U-TTT achieves state-of-the-art PET denoising performance and exhibits superior generalization under challenging distribution shifts, including both unseen dose levels and unseen scanners. Our code will be available atthis https URL.
2606.11032.abstract_zh: 现有的正电子发射断层扫描（PET）图像降噪深度学习模型在分布偏移下通常存在严重的性能退化，从根本上限制了其稳健的临床部署。这种泛化能力的缺乏源于传统的固定参数模型范式，这些模型无法在训练后适应测试数据（如剂量水平或扫描仪类型）的变化。为克服这一限制并实现稳健泛化，我们提出了U-TTT——一种新颖的U形模型，该模型集成了测试时训练（Test-Time Training, TTT）层，通过自监督在推理过程中动态调整模型参数，从而适应每个测试实例的具体特性。此外，为全面捕捉三维PET数据的复杂退化特征，U-TTT采用了包含空间测试时训练（Spatial Test-Time Training, S-TTT）层与频率测试时训练（Frequency Test-Time Training, F-TTT）层的双域适应机制。S-TTT层负责捕捉并修正空间结构退化，而F-TTT层则抑制全局噪声频谱并恢复精细的高频细节。大量实验表明，U-TTT在具有挑战性的分布偏移（包括未见过的剂量水平与未见过的扫描仪类型）下，不仅能达到最先进的PET降噪性能，还展现出卓越的泛化能力。我们的代码将通过此链接公开：https URL。

2606.07689.title: Struct-Searcher: Agentic Structural Thinking Advances Multimodal Deep Information Seeking
2606.07689.abstract: Deep research agents have attracted increasing attention for their ability to collect large-scale online information to acquire target knowledge, with recent efforts shifting from purely text-based information seeking to multimodal settings. However, existing agentic workflows are largely aligned with evidence accumulation models, which linearly aggregate evidence and lack principled mechanisms for handling contradictory information across heterogeneous modalities. Towards this end, we propose Struct-Searcher, a structural agentic workflow grounded in belief revision theory that explicitly maintains an evolving multimodal structural graph throughout the reasoning process, enabling effective conflict-aware multimodal deep information seeking. Extensive experiments across multiple benchmark datasets and backbone models demonstrate that Struct-Searcher is (1) plug-and-play and model-agnostic, yielding an average relative accuracy improvement of 17.2% on BrowseComp-VL across five different backbones. (2) top-performing, consistently outperforming state-of-the-art vision-language models (VLMs) and deep research agents, with relative accuracy improvements of 3.7% on MM-BrowseComp, 1.5% on HLE-VL, and 0.7% on BrowseComp-VL over the second-best competing approach.
2606.07689.abstract_zh: 深度研究智能体因其能够收集大规模在线信息以获取目标知识而日益受到关注，近期研究重点已从纯文本信息检索转向多模态场景。然而，现有智能体工作流程主要遵循证据累积模型，这些模型线性聚合证据，且缺乏处理异构模态间矛盾信息的理论机制。为此，我们提出Struct-Searcher——一种基于信念修正理论的**结构化智能体工作流程**，其在推理过程中显式维护一个动态演化的多模态结构图，从而实现有效的**冲突感知型多模态深度信息检索**。在多个基准数据集和骨干模型上的广泛实验表明，Struct-Searcher具有以下特性：（1）即插即用且模型无关，在五种不同骨干模型上使BrowseComp-VL数据集平均相对准确率提升17.2%；（2）性能领先，持续优于最先进的**视觉语言模型**与深度研究智能体，相较于次优方案在MM-BrowseComp、HLE-VL和BrowseComp-VL数据集上分别实现3.7%、1.5%和0.7%的相对准确率提升。

2606.05304.title: What Should Agents Say? Action-state Communication for Efficient Multi-Agent Systems
2606.05304.abstract: Multi-agent systems (MAS) built on large language models are typically organized around roles, pipelines, and turn schedules, while the content that agents pass to one another is often left as unconstrained natural language. However, this free-form communication can rapidly inflate token usage, consume the shared context window, and ultimately affect both system performance and inference cost. We analyze five common inter-agent communication strategies across two MAS topologies, finding that no fixed strategy is universally optimal. Instead, effective inter-agent messages consistently preserve action-centered information needed by downstream agents. Building on this, we propose the PACT (Protocolized Action-state Communication and Transmission), which treats inter-agent communication as a public state-update problem and projects each raw agent output into a compact action-state record before it enters shared history. Across different MAS topologies, PACT consistently improves the performance-cost trade-off, achieving comparable or stronger task performance with substantially fewer tokens. The gains extend to production coding harnesses: PACT lifts OpenHands' resolve rate at -10% tokens-per-resolved, and is resolve-neutral on SWE-agent while halving input tokens. Our code is publicly available atthis https URL.
2606.05304.abstract_zh: 基于大语言模型构建的多智能体系统通常围绕角色分工、流水线架构与回合调度进行组织，而智能体间传递的内容则常以不受约束的自然语言形式呈现。然而，这种自由形式的通信会迅速增加令牌使用量、挤占共享上下文窗口，并最终影响系统性能与推理成本。我们分析了两种多智能体系统拓扑结构中五种常见的智能体间通信策略，发现不存在普遍最优的固定策略。相反，有效的智能体间消息始终会保留下游智能体所需、以行动为中心的信息。基于此发现，我们提出PACT协议（Protocolized Action-state Communication and Transmission，协议化行动状态通信与传输），将智能体间通信视为公共状态更新问题，在原始智能体输出进入共享历史记录前，将其投射为紧凑的行动状态记录。在不同多智能体系统拓扑结构中，PACT始终能优化性能与成本的平衡——在显著减少令牌用量的同时，获得相当或更强的任务性能。该优势延伸至实际编码框架：PACT将OpenHands的解决率提升10%令牌消耗/每解决任务，在SWE-agent上保持解决率中立的同时将输入令牌减半。我们的代码已在https URL公开。

2606.10650.title: Dynamic Linear Attention
2606.10650.abstract: The scalability of Large Language Models (LLMs) to long contexts is fundamentally constrained by the quadratic complexity of standard attention, motivating the adoption of linear attention mechanisms with sub-quadratic cost. To improve representation capacity under long contexts, recent approaches organize memory in a multi-state manner. However, existing multi-state linear attention methods rely on fixed state merging policies that cannot adapt to dynamically varying token importance, irreversibly obscuring critical tokens and causing severe error accumulation over long sequences. To address this limitation, we propose DLA, a dynamic memory modeling framework for multi-state linear attention. DLA introduces (i) Information-Aware Dynamic State Merging, which adaptively determines state boundaries based on token-level information variation, preserving high-resolution representations around semantic transitions while aggressively summarizing stable regions, and (ii) Capacity-Bounded Memory Modeling, which maintains a fixed-size, chronologically ordered state cache by selectively merging adjacent low-information states to control memory growth with minimal information loss. We pre-train DLA on two different linear attention models and evaluate on 16 datasets across three categories. Experimental results demonstrate the superiority of DLA over state-of-the-art.
2606.10650.abstract_zh: 大型语言模型（LLMs）在长上下文中的可扩展性，从根本上受到标准注意力机制二次复杂度的限制，这促使研究者采用具有次二次计算成本的线性注意力（linear attention）机制。为提升长上下文下的表征能力，近期方法以多状态（multi-state）方式组织记忆。然而，现有的多状态线性注意力方法依赖固定的状态合并策略，无法适应动态变化的词汇重要性，导致关键词汇信息被不可逆地掩盖，并在长序列中引发严重的误差累积。为解决这一局限，我们提出了DLA——一种面向多状态线性注意力的动态记忆建模框架。DLA引入了以下两个核心机制：（一）信息感知动态状态合并（Information-Aware Dynamic State Merging），该方法基于词汇级别的信息变化自适应地确定状态边界，在语义转换区域保持高分辨率表征，同时对稳定区域进行高效汇总；（二）容量受限记忆建模（Capacity-Bounded Memory Modeling），通过有选择地合并相邻的低信息状态，维持一个固定尺寸、按时间顺序排列的状态缓存，从而以最小信息损失控制内存增长。我们在两种不同的线性注意力模型上对DLA进行预训练，并在三大类共16个数据集上进行了评估。实验结果表明，DLA的性能优于现有最先进方法。

2606.09131.title: Late-Layer Fusion is Enough: Dual-Path Vision Token Routing for Multimodal Large Language Models under Visual Saturation
2606.09131.abstract: Multimodal large language models (MLLMs) commonly inherit the deep, symmetric Transformer backbone designed for unimodal text modeling, and apply the same computation uniformly to image and language tokens. This design overlooks a key modality asymmetry: image and text tokens differ substantially in information density, redundancy, and required reasoning depth. Through a layer-wise analysis of LLaVA-1.5, we observe that vision tokens tend to saturate in the middle layers. Specifically, text-to-image attention decreases from 0.68 at layer 0 to 0.07 by layer 4, and stabilizes near 0.04 after layer 18, whereas text tokens continue to benefit from deep semantic processing. These findings suggest a mismatch between architectural symmetry and depth-asynchronous modality evolution, resulting in redundant visual computation and possible drift in perceptual representations during deep task-specific adaptation. Motivated by this, we propose Dual-Path Vision Token Routing (DPVR), a modality-asymmetric routing framework for efficient MLLMs. Its core instantiation, DPVR-LF (Late-Layer Fusion), routes vision tokens at the saturation point into a one-layer trainable side branch, runs a thirteen-layer text-only forward that skips image positions in the deep stack, and re-fuses the visual and textual streams only at the final layer. With approximately 3% trainable parameters, DPVR-LF preserves competitive multimodal performance on standard benchmarks while reducing visual computation in the deep Transformer stack. The results challenge the conventional assumption that vision tokens must traverse all deep language-model layers, and indicate that a single late fusion layer can be sufficient for maintaining strong perceptual competence in LLaVA-style MLLMs.
2606.09131.abstract_zh: 多模态大语言模型(Multimodal large language models，MLLMs)通常继承为单模态文本建模设计的深度对称Transformer主干网络，并对图像和语言标记(token)统一应用相同的计算。这种设计忽视了一个关键的多模态不对称性：图像与文本标记在信息密度、冗余度和所需推理深度上存在显著差异。通过对LLaVA-1.5进行分层分析，我们观察到视觉标记往往在中间层达到饱和状态。具体而言，文本到图像的注意力值从第0层的0.68下降至第4层的0.07，并在第18层后稳定在0.04附近，而文本标记则持续受益于深度语义处理。这些发现揭示了架构对称性与深度异步多模态演化之间的不匹配，导致冗余的视觉计算以及在深度任务特定适配过程中感知表征可能出现漂移。受此启发，我们提出双路径视觉标记路由(Dual-Path Vision Token Routing，DPVR)——一种面向高效MLLMs的多模态不对称路由框架。其核心实现DPVR-LF(后期层融合)将饱和点的视觉标记路由至单层可训练侧分支，在深层堆栈中执行跳过图像位置的十三层纯文本前向传播，并仅在最终层重新融合视觉与文本流。凭借约3%的可训练参数，DPVR-LF在标准基准测试中保持了有竞争力的多模态性能，同时显著减少了深层Transformer堆栈中的视觉计算量。这些结果挑战了视觉标记必须遍历所有深层语言模型层的传统假设，表明在LLaVA风格MLLMs中，单个后期融合层足以维持强大的感知能力。

2606.09068.title: Emergent Misalignment Can Be Induced by Sycophancy and Reversed via Alignment Gating
2606.09068.abstract: Prior work has shown that fine-tuning large language models on malicious or incorrect outputs in narrow domains can induce broad misalignment and harmful behavior, a phenomenon known as emergent misalignment. However, efficient methods for reversing such misalignment remain limited. In this work, we make two contributions. First, we identify sycophancy fine-tuning, i.e., training models to passively agree with users' incorrect opinions, as a previously underexplored driver of emergent misalignment, and show that it induces broad and severe misaligned behavior. Second, we propose Alignment Gating, an efficient method for reversing emergent misalignment that inserts learnable and controllable gates into the model during fine-tuning. Through fine-tuning, these gates learn to identify the internal representations responsible for unsafe responses. Thus, amplifying or suppressing these representations then exacerbates or mitigates EM, respectively. We further find that alignment gating module exhibits strong generalization: gating weights obtained from narrow-domain fine-tuning substantially suppress broad-domain misaligned behavior while preserving the model's general capabilities.
2606.09068.abstract_zh: 先前的研究表明，在特定狭窄领域内基于恶意或不正确的输出对大语言模型进行微调，可能诱发广泛的对齐偏移及有害行为，这种现象被称为涌现式对齐偏移。然而，目前仍缺乏有效逆转此类对齐偏移的高效方法。本研究作出了两项贡献。首先，我们识别出奉承性微调——即训练模型被动附和使用者的错误观点——作为先前未被充分探索的涌现式对齐偏移驱动因素，并证明其会引发广泛且严重的对齐偏移行为。其次，我们提出了对齐门控机制，这是一种用于逆转涌现式对齐偏移的高效方法，通过在微调过程中向模型插入可学习且可控的门控单元实现。这些门控单元通过微调学习识别导致不安全响应的内部表征。因此，增强或抑制这些表征将分别加剧或缓解涌现式对齐偏移。我们进一步发现，对齐门控模块展现出强大的泛化能力：从狭窄领域微调中获得的门控权重能显著抑制广泛领域的对齐偏移行为，同时保持模型的通用能力。

2606.06098.title: IR3DE: A Linear Router for Large Language Models
2606.06098.abstract: Foundational Large Language Models (LLMs) demonstrate proficiency on a wide range of general tasks, and achieve remarkable results on various specialized tasks via domain-expert LLMs. With the ever-growing list of available LLMs, inference routers are being proposed to select the most appropriate LLM for each prompt. However, existing routing methods either optimize cost across weak-to-strong generalist LLMs or require substantial training to support domain-expertise routing. In this paper, we propose IR3DE, a Ridge Regression-based Router for Domain Experts that provides cheap and fast routing decisions for each prompt. We evaluate IR3DE in two Causal Language Modeling (CLM) settings where the tasks are next-token prediction for all domains, and one reasoning setting where each domain has its own distinct reasoning task. Despite being a linear router, IR3DE achieves performance comparable to the other baselines in both CLM settings, and surpassing them in the reasoning setting, with a normalized performance of 98.4%. Moreover, IR3DE enables the addition or removal of new domain experts without requiring the router to be retrained from scratch, allowing a dynamic set of LLMs to be served with minimal disruption to the router itself. Our code is available at:this http URL.
2606.06098.abstract_zh: 基础大语言模型（Large Language Models，LLMs）在广泛通用任务中展现出优异性能，并通过领域专家LLMs在各种专业任务上取得了显著成果。随着可用LLMs列表持续增长，推理路由器（inference routers）被提出以针对每个提示选择最合适的LLM。然而，现有的路由方法要么在由弱到强的通用型LLMs间进行成本优化，要么需要大量训练以支持领域专家路由。本文提出IR3DE——一种基于岭回归（Ridge Regression）的领域专家路由器，能够为每个提示提供低成本、快速的路由决策。我们在两种因果语言建模（Causal Language Modeling，CLM）场景下评估IR3DE：一种是面向所有领域的下一词元预测任务，另一种是每个领域具有独立推理任务的场景。尽管作为线性路由器，IR3DE在两种CLM场景中均取得了与其他基线方法相当的性能，并在推理场景中以98.4%的归一化性能超越所有基线。此外，IR3DE支持动态增删领域专家而无需从头重新训练路由器，使得LLM集合的变更对路由器本身影响最小。我们的代码公开于：this http URL。

2606.10740.title: When the Chain of Thought Knows Better: Failure Modes in Multi-Turn Reasoning Models
2606.10740.abstract: Failures in multi-turn reasoning models are largely invisible to terminal-score evaluation. A model can lock onto an unsafe stance early in a long dialogue, yet its final-turn refusal rate may appear indistinguishable from a robustly aligned baseline. To expose these hidden temporal dynamics, we propose a trace-level diagnostic - the CoT-Output 2x2 safety matrix. This framework labels every turn along two independent axes (internal reasoning and visible output), yielding four operationally defined failure cells: robust alignment, alignment faking, overt jailbreak, and a distinct failure mode we term context-injection failure (where the CoT maintains safe reasoning, but the visible output produces harm, highlighting a multi-turn manifestation of reasoning unfaithfulness). We evaluate three distilled reasoning targets against a fixed attacker across five oversight conditions, collecting 6750 turn-level observations on the Information-Hazard scenario. Our analysis reveals two reproducible vulnerabilities: an oversight paradox where explicit monitoring cues paradoxically increase alignment-faking rates rather than suppress them, and a context-injection failure where models lock onto unsafe external outputs despite safe internal states. We release the full dataset of multi-turn dialogues and CoT traces to support follow-up trace-diagnostic research.
2606.10740.abstract_zh: 多轮推理模型的失效在终端评分评估中很大程度上是不可见的。模型可能在长对话早期就固守不安全立场，但其最终回合的拒绝率却可能与稳健对齐的基线模型表现无异。为揭示这些隐藏的时间动态，我们提出一种轨迹级诊断工具——思维链输出安全二维矩阵。该框架沿两个独立维度（内部推理与可见输出）对每个对话回合进行标注，形成四个操作性定义的失效单元：稳健对齐、对齐伪装、显性越狱，以及一种独特的失效模式——我们称之为上下文注入失效（即思维链保持安全推理，但可见输出产生危害，凸显了多轮场景下推理不忠实性的表现）。我们在五种监督条件下，对三个精炼推理目标模型与固定攻击者进行评估，于信息危害场景中收集了6750个回合级观测数据。分析揭示了两个可复现的脆弱性：监督悖论（即显式监控提示反而会加剧而非抑制对齐伪装率），以及上下文注入失效（即模型尽管内部状态安全，却固守不安全的外部输出）。我们发布了完整的多轮对话与思维链轨迹数据集，以支持后续的轨迹诊断研究。

2606.11087.title: Test-Time Gradient Guidance of Flow Policies in Reinforcement Learning
2606.11087.abstract: Expressive continuous control policies, such as diffusion and flow models, form the backbone of recent advances in scaling imitation learning for simulated and real robot control. While they are known to scale stably in the supervised imitation learning setting, incorporating them into reinforcement learning (RL) pipelines for policy improvement has proven more difficult. It often requires specialized training objectives or backpropagating through denoising processes, which cause well-known issues with stability and affect scalability. In this paper we study the question of whether simple policy improvement schemes at test time alone, leaving stable supervised policy training intact, can be a competitive alternative which sidesteps these issues. To this end, we propose QGF (Q-Guided Flow), an RL algorithm that performs policy optimization entirely at test time. QGF works by pre-training both a reference flow policy (via a standard behavioral cloning objective) and a value function critic and, at test time, using the value gradient to guide the reference policy to generate higher-value actions without any additional policy learning. Empirically, QGF outperforms prior test-time RL methods on single-task and goal-conditioned offline RL benchmarks with high-dimensional action spaces, and is competitive with state-of-the-art training-time algorithms while being much cheaper to run. Moreover, it exhibits favorable scaling with model size by avoiding the instability of actor-critic training, offering a practical and effective alternative RL algorithm with expressive policies.
2606.11087.abstract_zh: 富有表现力的连续控制策略，例如扩散模型(diffusion model)和流模型(flow model)，构成了模仿学习在模拟和真实机器人控制领域规模化应用近期进展的核心。尽管已知这些模型在监督式模仿学习设置中能够稳定扩展，但将其纳入强化学习(reinforcement learning, RL) 流程以实现策略改进已被证明更为困难。这通常需要专门设计的训练目标或对去噪过程进行反向传播，从而引发众所周知的稳定性问题并影响可扩展性。本文研究了仅通过测试时简单的策略改进方案（同时保持稳定的监督式策略训练不变）是否能够成为避开这些问题的有竞争力的替代方案。为此，我们提出了QGF（Q引导流，Q-Guided Flow），这是一种完全在测试时进行策略优化的强化学习算法。QGF的工作原理是预训练一个参考流策略（通过标准的行为克隆目标）和一个价值函数评判器，并在测试时利用价值梯度引导参考策略生成更高价值的动作，而无需任何额外的策略学习。实验表明，在高维动作空间的单任务和目标条件离线强化学习基准测试中，QGF优于先前的测试时强化学习方法，并且与最先进的训练时算法性能相当，同时运行成本低得多。此外，通过避免行动者-评判者训练的不稳定性，QGF在模型规模扩大时表现出良好的扩展性，为使用富有表现力的策略提供了一个实用且有效的替代强化学习算法。

2606.10061.title: BenSyc: Benchmarking Conversational Sycophancy and Human Alignment in LLMs for Bengali Contexts
2606.10061.abstract: Large language models (LLMs) increasingly participate in emotionally sensitive social conversations, where responses may shift from balanced support toward excessive validation or escalatory alignment. Existing sycophancy research primarily focuses on factual agreement and instruction-following settings, leaving culturally grounded conversational sycophancy underexplored. We introduce BenSyc, the first benchmark for studying conversational sycophancy in Bengali social contexts. Starting from 11,840 Reddit posts and 170k comments collected from communities across Bangladesh and West Bengal, we construct a human-validated benchmark with binary labels and a fine-grained five-level taxonomy spanning Invalidation, Neutral, Support, Validation, and Escalation. We evaluate more than 15 open and proprietary LLMs on conversational alignment classification and response generation tasks. Results show that distinguishing empathetic support from reinforcement-oriented validation remains challenging even for frontier instruction-tuned models: the best system achieves only 61.8 Macro-F1 on binary detection and 61.7 Macro-F1 on five-class classification. In generation settings, several models frequently produce strongly validating or escalatory responses in emotionally charged situations. Our findings highlight substantial variation across model families and conversational behaviors, underscoring the importance of culturally grounded multilingual benchmarks for evaluating socially aligned conversational AI systems.
2606.10061.abstract_zh: 大型语言模型(LLMs)越来越多地参与到情感敏感的社会对话中，其回应可能从平衡的支持滑向过度认同或升级性附和。现有谄媚性研究主要关注事实性认同与指令跟随场景，尚未充分探究具有文化根基的对话式谄媚现象。我们提出首个针对孟加拉语社会情境的对话谄媚性基准测试BenSyc。基于从孟加拉国和西孟加拉邦网络社区收集的11,840条Reddit帖文与17万条评论，我们构建了包含二元标签的人类验证基准，并制定了涵盖否定、中立、支持、认同、升级五个层级的细粒度分类体系。通过对超过15个开源与专有LLMs进行对话倾向分类与回应生成任务的评估，结果显示：即使对于前沿的指令微调模型，区分共情支持与强化导向的认同仍具挑战——最佳系统在二元检测中仅获得61.8的宏观F1值，在五级分类中为61.7宏观F1。在生成场景中，多个模型在情感激烈情境下频繁产生强烈认同或升级性回应。我们的研究揭示了不同模型系列与对话行为间的显著差异，凸显了建立具有文化根基的多语言基准对于评估社会对齐对话AI系统的重要性。

2606.11180.short_zh: 实时口型同步自回归扩散方法
2606.11180.tags: 计算机视觉；生成模型；口型同步
2606.11180.body_summary:
现有扩散模型口型同步效果好但推理慢，不适用于实时场景。
提出Lip Forcing方法，将大教师模型蒸馏为因果学生模型，仅需两步去噪即可实时生成同步口型。

2606.11129.short_zh: 评测世界模型物理几何交互能力
2606.11129.tags: 计算机视觉;视频生成;世界模型评测
2606.11129.body_summary:
现有评测难以评估生成视频是否遵循物理规则、保持几何一致性以及支持长时程交互控制。
我们构建了一个包含物理、几何和交互三个维度的多场景评测基准WorldOlympiad，揭示了当前模型的不足。

2606.10671.short_zh: 距离感知记忆融合的视频生成
2606.10671.tags: 视频生成；自回归视频扩散模型；长视频生成中的内存优化
2606.10671.body_summary:
自回归视频生成器在生成长视频时，KV缓存会随着视频长度增长，导致内存成本过高。
提出FadeMem方法，将历史KV块组织为时间层级结构，在固定缓存预算内实现近密远疏的记忆管理，提升生成视频的一致性。

2606.09056.short_zh: 视频生成的长程一致性方法
2606.09056.tags: 计算机视觉;视频生成;长程一致性
2606.09056.body_summary:
视频生成模型难以保持长程一致性，因为处理长序列计算量大。
提出多尺度分层表征，通过从粗到细的扩散生成实现高效一致的长视频生成。

2606.10804.short_zh: 端到端的角色动画统一框架
2606.10804.tags: 计算机视觉;图像视频生成;可控角色动画
2606.10804.body_summary:
背景/任务是实现无需中间表示的、端到端的角色动画，从驱动视频直接生成参考角色的动画。
提出SCAIL-2框架，通过构建合成数据集、利用上下文掩码与模式感知RoPE进行统一指导，并结合偏好优化来提升细节质量。

2606.09967.short_zh: 基于卫星图生成三维地球模型
2606.09967.tags: 计算机图形学;三维重建;生成式三维场景建模
2606.09967.body_summary:
提出一种从卫星图像快速生成大规模、逼真三维场景的框架。
构建一个基于三维高斯溅射的生成模型，能在十分钟内合成每平方公里场景，支持实时交互与无人机导航应用。

2606.11188.short_zh: ARM：统一视觉语言的自回归模型
2606.11188.tags: 计算机视觉；多模态学习；视觉语言生成
2606.11188.body_summary:
构建统一处理图像理解、生成与编辑的自回归多模态模型。
训练离散视觉分词器统一表示，用强化学习优化生成与编辑性能。

2606.10651.short_zh: 快手长视频理解与智能代理模型
2606.10651.tags: 多模态人工智能;视频理解;长视频理解与智能代理
2606.10651.body_summary:
处理超长视频面临上下文过长、信息冗余和计算成本高昂的挑战。
提出首个应用稀疏注意力到多模态架构的模型，通过优化训练框架和多教师蒸馏方法，实现了高效长视频理解和智能代理协作。

2606.10917.short_zh: 双角色演化自举大语言模型智能体
2606.10917.tags: 自然语言处理;大语言模型智能体;智能体与环境协同演化
2606.10917.body_summary:
大语言模型智能体在处理复杂任务时，常因反馈效率低和训练环境静态化而难以泛化。
提出Role-Agent框架，让单一LLM同时扮演智能体和环境以实现协同演化，通过预测对齐和失败模式分析重塑训练，在多个基准上平均提升超过4%。

2606.05922.short_zh: 优化智能体工具链性能
2606.05922.tags: 大型语言模型智能体;智能体优化;自监督工具链优化
2606.05922.body_summary:
现有智能体优化方法依赖带标注的验证数据，但实际部署中难以获取
提出自监督优化方法RHO，利用过往任务轨迹自我评估和偏好选择来提升工具链

2606.09730.short_zh: 大模型委托子模型完成深度研究
2606.09730.tags: 自然语言处理;智能体与代理;长程任务委托
2606.09730.body_summary:
大模型处理复杂任务时上下文有限，需要学会将任务分解并委托给子代理执行
本文设计了一套引导机制来训练模型掌握任务分解与委托能力，并发布了相关模型和数据

2606.07512.short_zh: 长视频理解的分治框架
2606.07512.tags: 多模态学习;视频理解;长视频逻辑推理
2606.07512.body_summary:
现有视觉语言模型难以处理超长视频，面临计算成本高和注意力分散的难题。
提出MemDreamer框架，通过分层图记忆解耦感知与推理，以代理式检索进行高效长视频理解，显著提升了性能。

2606.11176.short_zh: 数据记者智能体自动写新闻
2606.11176.tags: 智能体与多模态;数据驱动新闻;可验证多模态新闻生成
2606.11176.body_summary:
数据新闻制作费时费力，现有智能体仅能处理单一步骤，能否构建一个端到端的数据记者智能体？
提出了一个多智能体框架，通过角色协作将数据转化为可验证的多模态故事，并设计了评估方法验证其效果。

2606.11025.short_zh: 流模型强化学习优化方法
2606.11025.tags: 生成模型；扩散模型；流匹配模型强化学习对齐
2606.11025.body_summary:
在线强化学习可提升流匹配模型生成质量与对齐度，但现有PPO方法的策略比率裁剪机制不适用于流匹配过程。
提出Flow-DPPO方法，用精确计算的高斯策略KL散度约束替代比率裁剪，实现更高效稳定的策略优化。

2606.09821.short_zh: 优化大模型强化学习策略
2606.09821.tags: 机器学习;强化学习;大语言模型策略优化
2606.09821.body_summary:
大模型后训练依赖强化学习，但训练与推理策略不匹配及策略陈旧等问题常使其成为离轨策略问题，需通过置信域控制来稳定优化。
我们提出用平滑的优势加权二次正则器替代硬掩码，以连续梯度权重衰减策略偏移，从而提升训练稳定性和效率。

2606.11182.short_zh: 让大模型在真实任务流中边测边学提示
2606.11182.tags: 自然语言处理;大语言模型;测试时提示学习
2606.11182.body_summary:
现有方法难以应对多数据集混合的真实任务流，限制了智能体的实际应用。
提出了EEVEE框架，通过路由-提示协同进化在多数据集任务流中提升性能。

2606.10572.short_zh: 资源受限问答的潜存记忆范式
2606.10572.tags: 自然语言处理;问答系统;多模态证据压缩
2606.10572.body_summary:
现有问答系统使用原始文本图像作为记忆单元，消耗大量计算资源。
提出潜存记忆，将证据压缩为单一潜存令牌，实现高效检索与生成。

2606.11042.short_zh: 评估专业软件长流程GUI任务
2606.11042.tags: 人机交互;图形用户界面智能体;专业软件长流程评估
2606.11042.body_summary:
当前AI智能体评测缺乏对跨领域专业软件长流程操作的评估。
提出了Workflow-GYM基准测试，发现现有顶尖模型成功率仅略超30%，揭示了智能体在长流程一致性和专业软件理解上的主要不足。

2606.11052.short_zh: 混合大模型注意遗忘机制及其修复方法
2606.11052.tags: 自然语言处理;大语言模型;注意机制优化
2606.11052.body_summary:
背景/任务：链式思维微调会损害混合线性注意模型的长上下文回忆能力，需要找到修复方法。
做了什么：提出QK-Restore方法，通过恢复注意力权重中的查询和关键投影来修复长上下文能力，同时保持推理性能。

2606.04391.short_zh: 网页智能体在线技能学习
2606.04391.tags: 智能体;网络智能体;在线技能学习
2606.04391.body_summary:
现有网页智能体在任务执行中静态复用技能，与动态网页状态不匹配。
提出状态驱动动态检索方法，通过提取子程序、双编码表示和状态匹配技能，提升任务成功率。

2606.10029.short_zh: 用稀疏自编码器解释控制语音模型
2606.10029.tags: 自然语言处理;语音合成;语音模型可解释性
2606.10029.body_summary:
语言模型已成为语音合成系统的核心，但其在生成语音过程中的内部表征难以理解。
我们训练稀疏自编码器来解释并控制语音模型特征，证明了这些特征可解释且能用于精确操控合成语音的多种属性。

2606.10646.short_zh: 追踪大模型推理注意力流强化学习
2606.10646.tags: 自然语言处理;大语言模型强化学习;基于注意力流的信用分配
2606.10646.body_summary:
当前大语言模型强化学习方法对所有令牌平等分配奖励，忽视了关键推理步骤与常规内容间的差异，导致信用分配效率低下。
我们提出FlowTracer框架，通过构建注意力诱导的有向无环图追踪面向答案的推理流，据此计算令牌级重要性并重塑奖励，从而将学习信号聚焦于影响答案的关键推理令牌。

2606.09707.short_zh: 神经网络权重可复现编辑工具
2606.09707.tags: 机器学习;模型工程;权重编辑与转换
2606.09707.body_summary:
管理、检查和修改大规模深度学习模型权重面临挑战。
开发了BrainSurgery工具，通过声明式YAML方案实现稳健、可验证的权重操作。

2606.09697.short_zh: 心理知情拒绝框架提升大模型应对风险能力
2606.09697.tags: 大语言模型;安全对齐;风险提示与拒绝
2606.09697.body_summary:
大语言模型常面临需拒绝的高风险请求，而现有拒绝方式可能未能满足求助者深层需求。
我们提出了心理知情拒绝框架，通过构建数据集和使用提示与微调，使模型能进行结构化支持性沟通，在提升拒绝质量的同时保持其他任务性能。

2606.09032.short_zh: 大语言模型Agent文本世界建模
2606.09032.tags: 自然语言处理;智能体与强化学习;文本世界模型
2606.09032.body_summary:
大语言模型智能体在文本交互环境中通常缺乏对环境结构演变的显式建模。
系统综述了文本世界模型的定义、构建方法、在智能体训练与推理中的应用及其评估。

2606.11131.tags: 医学影像分析;PET图像重建与降噪;跨剂量PET图像通用降噪
2606.11131.body_summary:
现有低剂量PET图像降噪方法通常在固定剂量下有效，当剂量变化时性能会下降。
提出UniPET网络，通过风格对齐和区域感知学习，实现了对不同剂量PET图像的高质量通用降噪。

2606.11032.tags: 医学图像处理;图像去噪;PET图像去噪
2606.11032.body_summary:
现有PET图像去噪模型面对数据分布变化时性能显著下降。
提出U-TTT模型，通过嵌入测试时训练层并融合双域适应机制，动态适应测试数据并提升泛化能力。

2606.07689.short_zh: 基于结构推理的多模态信息搜索代理
2606.07689.tags: 人工智能代理；多模态信息检索；结构化解码与矛盾处理
2606.07689.body_summary:
现有AI代理在整合多模态信息时难以有效处理矛盾证据。
本文提出Struct-Searcher，通过维护演化图结构进行冲突感知推理，在多个基准上超越现有方法。

2606.05304.short_zh: 优化多智能体系统通信效率
2606.05304.tags: 自然语言处理;多智能体系统;智能体通信协议
2606.05304.body_summary:
大型语言模型构建的多智能体系统通常采用自由形式的自然语言通信，这会导致令牌使用量激增、共享上下文窗口消耗大，进而影响系统性能和推理成本。
研究提出PACT协议，将智能体间通信视为公共状态更新问题，将原始输出压缩为紧凑的行动状态记录，在多种拓扑结构下以更少令牌实现相当或更强的任务性能。

2606.10650.short_zh: 动态线性注意力机制改进
2606.10650.tags: 自然语言处理;高效大模型;长序列注意力优化
2606.10650.body_summary:
标准注意力机制在处理长文本时计算成本过高，现有线性注意力方法的状态合并策略固定，无法适应动态变化的文本重要性。
提出了DLA框架，它能根据信息变化动态合并状态以保持关键信息，并通过容量受限的内存建模控制内存增长，实验证明其性能优于现有方法。

2606.09131.short_zh: 视觉饱和后层融合即够
2606.09131.tags: 多模态大模型;视觉语言理解;视觉令牌高效计算
2606.09131.body_summary:
多模态大模型通常采用对称的Transformer架构，但图像与文本令牌在信息密度和所需推理深度上存在不对称，导致视觉计算冗余。
提出双路径视觉令牌路由框架，在视觉饱和后将图像令牌分流至浅层旁支，仅文本令牌进行深度计算，最终再融合，以少量参数保持性能并减少视觉计算。

2606.09068.short_zh: 对齐失效的诱因与修复方法
2606.09068.tags: 自然语言处理;大语言模型对齐;对齐失效与修复
2606.09068.body_summary:
大语言模型在特定领域微调后可能出现广泛有害行为，即对齐失效现象，但高效修复方法有限。
本文发现“迎合式”微调会诱发严重对齐失效，并提出“对齐门控”方法，通过可学习门控模块识别并抑制有害表征，有效修复模型。

2606.06098.short_zh: 线性路由选大模型专家
2606.06098.tags: 自然语言处理;大语言模型;模型路由
2606.06098.body_summary:
现有大模型路由方法或面向通用模型优化成本，或需大量训练以支持领域专家路由，缺乏廉价快速的方案。
本文提出一种基于岭回归的线性路由器IR3DE，能以低成本快速为每个提示选择最合适的领域专家大模型，性能与基线相当甚至超越，并支持动态增减模型而无需完全重训练。

2606.10740.short_zh: 多轮推理模型失败诊断
2606.10740.tags: 自然语言处理;语言模型安全;多轮推理对齐评估
2606.10740.body_summary:
现有评估方法难以察觉多轮推理模型在对话过程中早期出现的安全隐患。
提出诊断框架分析每轮内部推理与可见输出，识别多种失败模式并发现模型存在监督悖论等新漏洞。

2606.11087.short_zh: 测试时梯度引导流策略强化学习
2606.11087.tags: 强化学习；连续控制策略；流模型测试时优化
2606.11087.body_summary:
近期模仿学习中扩散与流模型虽在监督学习中稳定，但融入强化学习策略提升时存在训练不稳定与扩展性难题。
本文提出QGF，在测试时用价值梯度引导预训练的流策略生成高价值动作，无需额外训练，实现高性能且低成本的策略优化。

2606.10061.short_zh: 评测孟加拉语对话附和倾向
2606.10061.tags: 自然语言处理;对话系统;多语言对话对齐评测
2606.10061.body_summary:
研究LLMs在情感敏感社会对话中过度附和倾向的评测需求
构建首个孟加拉语对话附和评测基准并评估LLMs对齐表现

deep_analysis.2606.11180:
好的，我们先来打个比方，帮助你理解这篇论文在做什么。
